title: Mediterranean Duck Confit
description: A rich and savory dish featuring slow-cooked duck leg confit, served with a crunchy, decadent garnish.
instructions: Season the duck legs with salt and pepper.
In a large Dutch oven, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Sear the duck legs until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the Dutch oven to the preheated oven and cook for 2 1/2 hours, or until the duck is tender.
While the duck is cooking, mix the garlic, lemon juice, and rosemary in a small bowl.
After 2 hours of cooking, brush the duck legs with the garlic-herb mixture.
Continue cooking for the remaining 30 minutes.
To make the crunchy garnish, mix the breadcrumbs and shredded cheese in a small bowl.
Just before serving, sprinkle the breadcrumb mixture over the duck legs.
Serve the confit hot, garnished with the crunchy topping.
